sentence: Vayse meu corach√≥n de mib.

sentence: Enfermo yed, ¬Ņku√°nd sanarad?

sentence: ¬ŅQu√© far√© yo, o qu√© serad de mib?

sentence: ¬°Tant amare, tant amare, Šł•abib, tant amare!

sentence: Non te tolgas de mib, ya Šł•abibi.

sentence: Welyos nidios ke tan mal dolen.

sentence: Filyo de la bokella dol√ße.

sentence: La farina bona yed en la yana.

sentence: Matar me kere el amor.

sentence: Bene serad si tornarad meu senyor.

sentence: Ay, mano, meu Šł•abib enfermo yed.

sentence: Rrey de los cielos, sana meu male.
